title: Flash Speedmop Wet Floor Cleaning Wipes, 96 Cloths (24x4), Antibac Lemon Multi-Surface, Trap & Lock Daily Dirt, Grease & Grime Without Getting Down On Your Knees ( Package may vary)
features: EASY CLEANING: Trap and lock daily dirt, grease and grime without getting down on your knees using the Flash Speed Mop, a perfect addition to your cleaning tools.
ANTI-BACTERIAL: This floor cleaner mop is an anti-bacterial floor cleaner, killing 99.9% of bacteria, ensuring a clean and safe environment.
THICK AND WET: 2 times thicker and wetter than regular floor wipes, Flash Speed Mop refill wipes dissolve through stubborn dirt and grime, making it an efficient household wet & dry mop.
FRESH SCENT: Fills your home with a fresh lemon scent and leaves floors shiny, safe for use across all hard sealed surfaces.
TOUGH STAIN FIGHTER: Flash mop refill pads are tough stain fighters with the built-in scrubby strip.
description: Product Description Flash Speedmop Wet Cloth Refills are the quick, easy and hygienic way to keep on top of daily floor dirt. Packed with a powerful dirt-dissolving solution, they trap and lock dirt and grime, pulling it deep into the cloth and off your floors. In fact, they're 2x thicker and wetter than floor wipes and they kill 99.9% of bacteria! When daily dirt occurs reach for your Flash Speedmop. Filled with classic Flash lemon scent scent, re-assuringly clean. Remove really tough stains with the built-in scrubby strip. Once finished rip off the dirty wet cloth for a hygienic clean and recycle the used wet cloth through Terracycle.
